subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the Wronged One unto them that have believed in God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting. This is a Day wherein the treasures of the earth have been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم هذا یوم فیه ظهرت کنوز الارض و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for opponents; enemies of the Faith
